text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on the team — please review the mod guidelines in #rules and don't hesitate to ask questions. Welcome aboard!
Hey guide_sam, welcome! You're in as an event_helper. Check out #events for upcoming activities and #rules for community guidelines. Looking forward to working with you!
Welcome newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Take a look around, read #rules, and feel free to introduce yourself. Great to have you here!
Welcome mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience is a huge asset — check #mentorship for how to get started and #rules for community guidelines. Happy to have you!
